name: Wigner D-matrix - Wikipedia
snippet: The Wigner D-matrix is a unitary matrix in an irreducible representation of the groups SU (2) and SO (3). It was introduced in 1927 by Eugene Wigner, and plays a fundamental role in the quantum mechanical theory of angular momentum.
